Metadata.title: Qompono — Electrical Design Platform
Metadata.description: The complete platform for electrical engineering design. From floor plan to single-line diagram in just a few clicks.
Metadata.featuresDescription: Discover all Qompono features: floor plan editor, single-line diagrams, board design and KNX configuration.
Metadata.pricingDescription: Transparent pricing for every type of construction professional. Start free and upgrade when ready.
Metadata.contactDescription: Get in touch with the Qompono team. Request a demo or ask your questions.

Hero.title: Electrical design,
Hero.subtitle: From floor plan to single-line diagram in just a few clicks. The complete platform for electricians, architects and engineering firms.

SocialProof.title: Built for construction professionals in Belgium and the Netherlands

FeatureHighlights.title: Everything in one platform
FeatureHighlights.subtitle: From design to documentation — all the tools you need.

floorplan.title: Floor Plan Editor
floorplan.description: Draw and edit floor plans with drag-and-drop electrical symbols. Import PDF, DXF or images.

wiring.title: Single-Line Diagram
wiring.description: Automatically generate single-line diagrams from your floor plan. AREI-compliant validation included.

board.title: Board Designer
board.description: Design distribution boards visually with a component library and DIN rail layout.

knx.title: KNX Wizard
knx.description: Configure smart building automation with intuitive input/output mapping.

HowItWorks.title: Ready in 3 steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: Qompono makes electrical design simple and fast.

step1.title: Upload your plan
step1.description: Import your floor plan as PDF, DXF or image. Or draw directly from scratch.

step2.title: Design with symbols
step2.description: Drag AREI-compliant symbols to the right position. Automatic labeling and cable calculation.

step3.title: Generate documents
step3.description: With one click, generate single-line diagrams, board designs and professional PDF exports.

floorplan.title: Powerful floor plan editor
floorplan.description: Our editor combines the power of professional CAD software with the ease of drag-and-drop.

wiring.title: Automatic single-line diagram
wiring.description: Generate professional single-line diagrams directly from your floor plan. No more double work.

Testimonials.title: What our users say
Testimonials.subtitle: Construction professionals trust Qompono for their daily work.

CTA.title: Ready to get started?
CTA.subtitle: Try Qompono for free and discover how simple electrical design can be.

Features.title: Everything you need for electrical design
Features.subtitle: Qompono is the integrated platform that covers every aspect of electrical engineering design.

floorplan.title: Floor Plan Editor
floorplan.subtitle: Professional floor plans in minutes
floorplan.description: Draw building plans and place electrical symbols with intuitive drag-and-drop. Import existing plans or start from scratch.

wiring.title: Single-Line Diagram Editor
wiring.subtitle: From floor plan to diagram in one click
wiring.description: Automatically generate single-line diagrams from your floor plan. Edit circuits, validate against AREI standards and export as PDF.

board.title: Board Designer
board.subtitle: Visually design distribution boards
board.description: Design electrical distribution boards with an extensive component library. Automatic generation from your diagrams.

knx.title: KNX Wizard
knx.subtitle: Configure smart building automation
knx.description: Configure KNX systems with an intuitive wizard. Map inputs and outputs, select products and generate configuration files.

Pricing.title: Transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you. Cancel anytime.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect to get started with electrical design.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations and engineering firms.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.a1: Yes, you can try Qompono free for 14 days without a credit card. All features are available during the trial period.
FAQ.q2: Can I cancel at any time?
FAQ.a2: Absolutely. There is no minimum contract duration. You can cancel your subscription at any time.
FAQ.a3: We accept credit card, Bancontact and bank transfer for annual subscriptions.
FAQ.a4: Yes, all your data is stored encrypted in secure European data centers. We comply with GDPR regulations.
FAQ.a5: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The difference is calculated pro-rata.
FAQ.a6: Yes, with Professional and Enterprise plans, we offer personalized onboarding and training.
